segments.caption: The video opens with Gordon Ramsay, dressed in a black t-shirt, standing in a modern, well-lit kitchen with stainless steel appliances and shelves stocked with cooking essentials. He appears to be speaking directly to the camera with a serious expression. The scene quickly shifts to Tom Holland, wearing a beige button-up shirt and a maroon apron with 'BERO' printed on it, who gestures animatedly while speaking. The two are then shown together in the kitchen, with Gordon pointing toward a counter filled with ingredients including onions, limes, and several cans labeled 'BERO'. A title card appears with the text 'SCRAMBLED with Gordon Ramsay', sponsored by HEXCLAD, featuring a stylized egg yolk splash. The video cuts between close-ups of both men as they interact, with Tom looking engaged and occasionally glancing at Gordon. The setting transitions briefly to a professional kitchen with industrial equipment and then to a dimly lit restaurant with hanging lights and tables, suggesting a broader culinary context. The segment returns to the kitchen, where Gordon and Tom continue their conversation, with Tom holding a lime and Gordon gesturing toward the ingredients. The atmosphere is dynamic and collaborative, with both men actively involved in the cooking demonstration. On-screen text identifies Tom Holland, and the camera focuses on the cans and ingredients, emphasizing the branded products. The lighting remains bright and professional throughout, highlighting the clean, modern kitchen environment.

segments.caption: The video opens with Gordon Ramsay, a man with spiky blonde hair wearing a black t-shirt, holding a gold-colored BERO can and speaking animatedly in a modern stainless steel kitchen. He gestures with intensity as he talks, then transitions to actively preparing food, chopping a cabbage on a wooden board. Tom Holland, wearing a beige button-up shirt and a maroon apron with 'BERO' printed on it, appears beside him, arms crossed, listening and responding with expressive gestures. The two interact dynamically, with Gordon Ramsay coating pieces of chicken in flour and placing them on a tray while Tom Holland continues to chop cabbage. The kitchen environment remains bright and professional, with stainless steel appliances, shelves stocked with bottles, and several BERO cans prominently displayed on the counter. The camera alternates between close-ups of their faces and wider shots showing their collaborative cooking process, emphasizing their engagement and the clean, organized workspace. No title card or restaurant interior is visible in this segment.

The kitchen remains bright and professional, with various cooking tools, ingredients, and multiple BERO cans visible on the counter. The atmosphere is collaborative and energetic, with both men focused on their tasks and interacting dynamically. The segment ends with Gordon turning to Tom, continuing their conversation as they prepare components for a dish, likely a burger given the presence of buns and shredded purple cabbage.
